title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: Fresh API Docs
gist.blurb: Our API documentation just got a fresh coat of paint to match the latest production deploy.
gist.summary: Automated sync of APIDOCS.md to reflect the latest OpenAPI spec changes from production.
gist.impact: Developers have access to the most up-to-date API endpoints and parameters.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) organizing or reading a large pixelated book or scroll (representing documentation). The Nomnom creature eating old pages.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing a glowing pixelated scroll of documentation. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the old deprecated pages. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
